title: Rose Haven Network Cobblemon
description: A simple pack which contains Cobblemon, and all of the optional client-side mods to get the full experience on our Cobblemon server.
body:
### **Rose Haven Network - Aurora**

[![Modrinth Gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rhn/gallery)[![Join Our Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/5CA8sewarU)[![Support via PayPal](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-plural_64h.png)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/MystixMew)  

---  

## **What mods are in the Aurora Modpack?**
**Aurora's Modpack** has been made with one mod in mind: [**Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon). Though the modpack may be built for a server, we still want to give players a better expierence playing singleplayer & multiplayer, this modpack includes many **client-side mods** that have new visual effects, shaders, and performance related additions. Among these additions, the following are some of the most useful:

- **[Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)** – A mod which has information relating to recipes, etc.
- **[Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura)** – A mod which allows you to make custom player models & use them in game.
- **[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)** and **[World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)** for Waypoints, and Pokémon, etc.
- **[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)** adds shader support, allowing you to get amazing visuals.
- **[Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft)** - For VR players! This does not change anything for non-vr players!
---

## **What Makes This Modpack Unique?**
In contrast to other modpacks, **Aurora's Modpack** is built to give **quality and optimized** gameplay to **Cobblemon** players. Although **Cobblemon** is the core mod, we have also included other **client-side mods** that both improve your experience and performance.

---
